ideation: This animation sequence depicts the robot carefully holding a takeout box.  The movement starts with both arms extended slightly forward and palms up, ready to receive the box. Then, the arms move slightly inward and downward, cradling the box gently. Finally, the arms settle into a comfortable holding position, suggesting the robot is carefully carrying the box. The main focus is on the gentle, protective movement of the arms.  The left arm will be slightly more forward as it is the primary arm holding the box, while the right arm is more of a support.

frames.beat: arms extend forward, palms up, ready to receive
arms gently cradle the takeout box, moving inward
arms settle, carefully carrying the box forward
